summary: Fixed the AskUserQuestion Pimote hang by matching remote ask_answer/ask_dismiss frames on requestId only, avoiding brittle sessionFile path equality. Removed unrelated round-1 hunks so the diff is limited to the requested guard change.
filesChanged: extensions/AskUserQuestion/index.ts - changed connectRemoteDialog websocket message correlation to requestId-only
raw:
## Completed
Implemented the requested surgical fix: `connectRemoteDialog` now correlates daemon replies by `requestId` only, so normalized `sessionFile` paths no longer cause answers to be dropped.

Also reverted the unrelated round-1 refactor hunks, leaving only the required guard change in the diff.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/AskUserQuestion/index.ts` - changed websocket message guard to `if (frame.requestId !== args.requestId) return;`

## How To Verify
```bash
bash extensions/AskUserQuestion/test/logic_test.sh && npx -y esbuild@latest extensions/AskUserQuestion/index.ts --format=cjs --platform=node --outfile=/tmp/askuserquestion-index.js --log-level=warning
```

## Notes
- Audited `connectRemoteDialog`; no other daemon-returned `sessionFile` correlation checks remain.
- `logic.ts` was not modified.
- `git diff -- extensions/AskUserQuestion/index.ts` now shows only the one requested line change.
